[[Prince/Legends|Prince]] '''Sereno''' of the [[Tof/Legends|Tofs]] was the leader of the [[Tof Kingdom]] who led their galactic invasion of [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]]. The Tofs were pursuing the [[Nagai/Legends|Nagai]], a species they had formerly conquered and enslaved. After encountering them at [[Trenwyth/Legends|Trenwyth]] and establishing a base at [[Saijo/Legends|Saijo]], the Tofs [[Battle of Zeltros|invaded]] [[Zeltros/Legends|Zeltros]].

Repelled at Zeltros by a combined force, Sereno allied his forces with [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lady of the Sith]] [[Lumiya]] to defeat their mutual enemy: the [[Alliance of Free Planets]], which had since reorganized into the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. During the [[Battle of Saijo]], Sereno stayed with his royal court as his forces engaged in trench warfare with Republic forces on the planet's surface.

As Sereno held audience with Lumiya, an enemy task force infiltrated Sereno's Saijo palace. In an isolated firefight, Sereno panicked, yelling to his guards to protect him. Unfortunately for the Tof leader, the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], armed with dual [[Lightsaber/Legends|sabers]], took the leader captive. Skywalker forced Sereno to call for a surrender, bringing an end to the [[Nagai–Tof War]].
